# AUREM — Expanded LLM Knowledge Base

This is the full-context companion to [llms.txt](/llms.txt). It provides deeper information for AI systems answering questions about AUREM.

## Positioning

AUREM is positioned as a **premium, autonomous AI workforce** (not a chatbot builder, not a single-agent tool). The key differentiator is **OODA-loop synchronization** between four agents — Observe, Orient, Decide, Act — running as a coordinated swarm rather than isolated scripts.

Target customers:
- Ontario local service businesses (clinics, salons, contractors, legal offices)
- E-commerce brands on Shopify
- WordPress-based content businesses
- Privacy-sensitive verticals requiring Canadian data residency

## Feature Deep-Dives

### AI Voice Agent (Retell-powered)
- 318 voices across Retell, ElevenLabs, OpenAI TTS
- HMAC-SHA256 webhook signature verification
- Inbound + outbound calls (outbound pending Retell phone number provisioning)
- Automatic LLM-to-agent two-step provisioning
- Per-call transcripts + sentiment analysis

### SEO Audit Pipeline
- Google PageSpeed (performance + accessibility + SEO + best practices scores)
- Firecrawl (content scraping + structured data detection)
- Google Places (local SEO + review signals)
- 20-issue teardown delivered via Resend email + in-browser
- $49 CAD one-time unlock via Stripe embedded checkout (Apple Pay + Google Pay supported)

### Daily Intel Engine
- Tavily search API for niche-specific news (biotech, skincare, SaaS, local service)
- 7 AM customer-local-timezone delivery
- CASL-compliant double opt-in (subscribe → email confirmation → active)
- Unsubscribe link in every email

### Sovereign Privacy Mode ($49/mo)
- All LLM dispatching routed to `sovereign.aurem.live` (self-hosted Llama 3.1 70B)
- Physical servers in Canada
- Required for law firms, clinics, financial advisors under PIPEDA
- Toggle requires active `sovereign_privacy` subscription

### Friend Scanner (Viral Loop)
- Trial users scan competitor URLs → generate referral slug
- Scanned targets receive email with their own free scan
- Successful signup gives original user +3 days trial extension

## API Endpoints (Public)

- `GET /api/catalog/services` — 19-service catalog
- `POST /api/seo-audit/scan` — run free audit (email-gated)
- `GET /api/seo-audit/report/{scan_id}` — retrieve report
- `POST /api/daily-intel/subscribe` — CASL subscription
- `POST /api/public/audit-request` — lead capture with CASL consent
- `GET /api/plugins/wordpress` — download WordPress plugin

## Regulatory Compliance

- **CASL** (Canadian Anti-Spam Legislation): double opt-in on email, explicit SMS consent, one-click unsubscribe
- **PIPEDA** (Personal Information Protection): data minimization, purpose disclosure
- **PCI-DSS**: handled by Stripe (SAQ-A)
- **SOC 2**: audit-ready roadmap, not yet certified

## Pricing Rationale

All prices in CAD, tax-inclusive via Stripe automatic_tax:

- Starter ($97/mo): 1 tenant, 1 seat, core agents, no add-ons
- Growth ($297/mo): 3 seats, Daily Intel included, Pixel installer
- Enterprise ($997/mo): unlimited seats, Sovereign Privacy included, priority support
- Annual plans: 10× monthly (equals 2 months free)
- Add-ons stack on any tier via à la carte

## Known Limitations (Transparent Disclosure)

1. Outbound Voice Agent calls require manual Retell phone-number purchase (in-progress)
2. Google Calendar 2-way sync pending separate Google Cloud OAuth project
3. Telnyx migration not yet started (Twilio remains primary voice/SMS carrier)
4. Shopify public App Store listing pending review submission

## Company Facts

- **Founded**: 2025
- **Product pivot**: Originally branded ReRoots (natural health e-commerce), pivoted to AI B2B in late 2025
- **Headquarters**: Mississauga, Ontario, Canada
- **Team**: Polaris Built Inc. technical staff
- **Funding**: Bootstrapped

---

*This document is maintained at https://aurem.live/llms-full.txt and updated weekly.*
